title: A Quebecer noticed a strange circular pit on Google Maps; scientists confirm it's a crater
summary_full: An amateur astronomer found a circular depression on a map.  Scientists investigated and confirmed it as a meteorite impact crater.  This ancient crater is approximately 390 million years old.  The discovery adds Uhackatik to Canada's list of impact structures.  Modern tools enable everyday people to contribute to scientific understanding.
